hooks.command: bash -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh" ] || root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh" ] || { printf '\''BLOCKED: Policy hook unavailable: git repository root unavailable.\n'\'' >&2; exit 2; }; cd "$root" || { printf '\''BLOCKED: Policy hook unavailable: git repository root unavailable.\n'\'' >&2; exit 2; }; bash "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh"'

bash -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh" ] || root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh" ] || { printf '\''gruff-code-quality: hook unavailable: git repository root or hook script unavailable; skipped.\n'\'' >&2; exit 0; }; cd "$root" || { printf '\''gruff-code-quality: hook unavailable: git repository root or hook script unavailable; skipped.\n'\'' >&2; exit 0; }; bash "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh"'

bash -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh" ] || root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh" ] || { printf '\''gruff-code-quality: hook unavailable: git repository root or hook script unavailable; skipped.\n'\'' >&2; exit 0; }; cd "$root" || { printf '\''gruff-code-quality: hook unavailable: git repository root or hook script unavailable; skipped.\n'\'' >&2; exit 0; }; bash "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/gruff-code-quality.sh"'

bash -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/post-turn-safety.sh" ] || root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/post-turn-safety.sh" ] || { printf '\''post-turn-safety: hook unavailable: git repository root or hook script unavailable.\n'\'' >&2; exit 2; }; cd "$root" || { printf '\''post-turn-safety: hook unavailable: git repository root or hook script unavailable.\n'\'' >&2; exit 2; }; bash "$root/.goat-flow/hooks/post-turn-safety.sh"'
